ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the patient (0 = female, 1 = male) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the patient */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the patient */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the doctor */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the doctor */,
  "hospital_affiliation" TEXT /* Hospital affiliation of the doctor */,
  "office_address" TEXT /* Office address of the doctor */,
  "office_phone_number" TEXT /* Office phone number of the doctor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the hospital */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the hospital */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the hospital */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the record belongs to */,
  "cp" INTEGER /* Chest pain type (1-4) */,
  "trtbps" INTEGER /* Resting blood pressure (mmHg) */,
  "chol" INTEGER /* Cholesterol level (mg/dl) */,
  "fbs" INTEGER /* Fasting blood sugar (mg/dl) */,
  "restecg" INTEGER /* Resting electrocardiogram results (0-2) */,
  "thalach" INTEGER /* Maximum heart rate achieved (bpm) */,
  "exng" INTEGER /* Exercise induced angina (0-1) */,
  "oldpeak" REAL /* Oldpeak? */,
  "slp" INTEGER /* Slope of the peak exercise ST segment (0-2) */,
  "caa" INTEGER /* Number of major vessels colored by fluoroscopy (0-3) */,
  "thall" INTEGER /* Thalassemia (0-3) */,
  "medications" TEXT /* Medications the patient is taking */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Allergies the patient has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical record the diagnosis belongs to */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date the diagnosis was made */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis made by the doctor */,
  "diagnosis_code" TEXT /* ICD-10 code for the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_description" TEXT /* Description of the diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES medical_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical record the treatment belongs to */,
  "treatment_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment was prescribed */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment prescribed by the doctor */,
  "treatment_code" TEXT /* CPT code for the treatment */,
  "treatment_description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES medical_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the appointment belongs to */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor the appointment is with */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "appointment_status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical record the medication belongs to */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the medication */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the medication */,
  "medication_status" TEXT /* Status of the medication (e.g., active, inactive, discontinued) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES medical_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the system was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the system was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, view patient record) */,
  "resource_accessed" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user (e.g., patient record, medication list) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_providers" (
  "insurance_provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance provider */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the insurance provider */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the insurance provider */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the insurance provider */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the insurance provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_insurance" (
  "patient_insurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient insurance record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the insurance record belongs to */,
  "insurance_provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance provider */,
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number of the patient's insurance */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the patient's insurance */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the patient's insurance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_insurance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_insurance_insurance_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("insurance_provider_id") REFERENCES insurance_providers ("insurance_provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_insurance_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing" (
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the billing record belongs to */,
  "insurance_provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance provider */,
  "billing_date" TEXT /* Date the billing record was created */,
  "billing_amount" REAL /* Amount of the billing record */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, denied) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_insurance_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("insurance_provider_id") REFERENCES insurance_providers ("insurance_provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
